cli.tauriOnly: CLI commands are only available in the Tauri app.

groupDescriptions.jobSetup: Identify the option and configure how its source files are processed.
groupDescriptions.outputs: Choose which asset types to include in this conversion.
groupDescriptions.generatedFiles: Optionally generate Event.xml and ReleaseTag.xml alongside the converted assets.
groupDescriptions.option: Name the option and control how its source files are discovered.
groupDescriptions.conversion: Choose which asset types are included in this export.
groupDescriptions.eventXml: Configure unlock events when Event XML generation is enabled.
groupDescriptions.releaseTagXml: Configure release metadata when Release Tag XML generation is enabled.
groupDescriptions.metadata: Review the values that will be used to build the song data.

songId.label: Song ID
songId.description: The numeric Song ID used by the game and read from the chart metadata.

displayBpm.label: Display BPM
displayBpm.description: The BPM shown for this song in the song selection menu.

chartDiscovery.label: Chart formats
chartDiscovery.description: The ordered chart formats to scan. Earlier formats take priority when duplicate charts share the same Song ID and difficulty.

genre.label: Genre
genre.description: The song category used by the game.

sortName.label: Sort name
sortName.description: The name used when sorting songs in the game.

releaseDate.label: Release date
releaseDate.description: The release date written to generated song data (yyyy-MM-dd).

mainTil.label: Main timeline
mainTil.description: The timeline ID used as the chart's main timeline.

stage.label: Stage
stage.description: The background stage shown in the game. It can also be set from the chart comment with #meta stage [StringID].

releaseTag.label: Release tag
releaseTag.description: The release category assigned to generated song data.

unlockEvent.label: Unlock event ID
unlockEvent.description: The event that unlocks an ULTIMA or WORLD'S END chart in the game.

previewStart.label: Preview start (s)
previewStart.description: The time, in seconds, at which the song-selection preview begins.

previewStop.label: Preview stop (s)
previewStop.description: The time, in seconds, at which the song-selection preview ends.

manualOffset.label: Manual offset (s)
manualOffset.description: A timing adjustment in seconds. Positive values delay the song; negative values advance it.

realOffset.label: Real offset (s)
realOffset.description: The final timing offset after the blank measure and manual adjustment are applied.

initialBpm.label: Initial BPM
initialBpm.description: The BPM at the start of the chart, used to calculate the real offset.

timeSignature.label: Initial time signature
timeSignature.description: The beats per measure and note value at the start of the chart, used to calculate the real offset.

blankMeasure.label: Insert blank measure
blankMeasure.description: Insert a silent measure with click cues before the first musical measure, matching Margrete's blank-measure option.

stageId.label: Stage ID
stageId.description: The numeric ID used to name and register the generated stage.

notesFieldLine.label: Field line color
notesFieldLine.description: The field-line color asset used by the generated stage.

hcaKey.label: HCA encryption key
hcaKey.description: The encryption key applied to the generated HCA audio.

jacketFile.label: Jacket file
jacketFile.description: The jacket image referenced by the chart.

backgroundFile.label: Background file
backgroundFile.description: The custom stage background image referenced by the chart.

errors.chartUnread: The chart could not be read.
errors.invalidHcaKey: HCA encryption key must be an unsigned 64-bit integer.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.pageLoadDescription: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page.
generic.appDescription: An unexpected error occurred in the application.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved.

alerts.fileChanged: A chart file was modified at {time}. Reload to use the latest version.

metadata.instruction: Add this command to the chart Comment field:
metadata.twoValueHint: One value searches known assets by ID or name. Two values use the supplied ID and custom name directly.
metadata.imageAlt: Chart metadata command example from the PenguinTools wiki

hints.main: Use true to make this chart the song's baseline difficulty during option scanning. Without an explicit baseline, the highest difficulty is used.
hints.date: Use an eight-digit date in yyyyMMdd format.

onboarding.title: Collect game assets
onboarding.description: Optional CHUNITHM install data is not present yet. Scan a game folder to load the latest genre, stage, and notes-field IDs, or continue with the built-in defaults.

audio.dropMessage: Drop audio or a chart here

errors.noAudioInChart: No audio file was found in the chart. Browse or drop one instead.
errors.missingAudioOrSongId: Select audio and provide an integer Song ID.

notify.invalidDrop: Drop a chart, WAV, OGG, or MP3 file here.

chart.dropMessage: Drop a chart to inspect and edit

errors.missingChart: Select a valid chart file first.
errors.invalidSongIdOrBpm: Check the Song ID and Display BPM values.

notify.invalidDrop: Drop an MGXC, UGC, SUS, or C2S chart file here.

jacket.dropMessage: Drop a jacket image or chart

errors.noImageInChart: No jacket image was found in the chart. Browse or drop one instead.
errors.invalidJacketId: Jacket ID must be an integer or left empty.

notify.invalidDrop: Drop a chart or image file here.

errors.invalidProperties: Check the song, chart, and timing property values.
errors.missingBackground: Select a custom stage background file first.
errors.missingStageId: Provide a Stage ID for custom stage export.

preview.notAvailable: Not available. Select a chart file to inspect its properties.

inspectorHelp.title: The song title read from the chart metadata.
inspectorHelp.artist: The artist name read from the chart metadata.
inspectorHelp.mgxcId: The original MGXC identifier, when the selected chart format provides one.
inspectorHelp.designer: The chart designer or author read from the chart metadata.
inspectorHelp.difficulty: The game difficulty assigned to this chart.
inspectorHelp.difficultyId: The numeric game difficulty identifier used during conversion.
inspectorHelp.level: The chart level shown in the song selection menu.
inspectorHelp.weTag: The WORLD'S END category label used for this chart.
inspectorHelp.weDifficulty: The WORLD'S END difficulty label and star count.
inspectorHelp.customStage: Whether conversion generates a custom stage from the chart's background image.
inspectorHelp.resolvedFile: The absolute source path resolved from the path stored in the chart.
inspectorHelp.audioFile: The BGM source path referenced by the chart.
inspectorHelp.barOffset: The calculated duration of the inserted blank measure.
inspectorHelp.chartFile: The chart file path reported by the parser.
inspectorHelp.inputPath: The source path supplied to the chart inspection command.

stage.dropMessage: Drop a background, chart, or effect images

errors.noBackgroundInChart: No stage background was found in the chart. Browse or drop one instead.
errors.missingBackgroundOrStageId: Select a background and provide an integer Stage ID.

notify.slotsFull: The stage already has a background and four effect images.
notify.invalidDrop: Drop a chart or one or more image files here.

option.emptyPreview: Select an option folder to scan its contents.

fieldDescriptions.optionName: Four-character identifier used for the generated option.
fieldDescriptions.batchSize: Maximum number of charts or books converted at the same time. Use -1 for no limit.
fieldDescriptions.outputTypes: Choose which asset types to include in the output.

chartFormats.reloadPrompt: Save the updated format order and reload to apply it to the scan preview.

errors.missingNameOrConfig: Provide a 4-character option name, or select a folder that contains an options.json config file.
errors.noop: Enable at least one conversion type or Event XML generation.

scan.noMatchesDescription: No charts matched the current formats. Add the required format in Settings, then save and reload.
scan.moreIssues: … and {count} more. Open Diagnostics for the full list.

preview.title: Preview
preview.notAvailable: Select a book or chart in the preview tree.

help.mainDifficulty: The chart used as the shared song metadata source during option conversion.
help.main: Whether this chart is explicitly marked as the baseline for shared song metadata during option conversion.

errors.missingChart: Select a C2S chart file first.
errors.invalidSongIdOrBpm: Check the Song ID and Display BPM values.

notify.invalidDrop: Drop a C2S chart file here.

audio.dropMessage: Drop an ACB or AWB file here

errors.missingAudio: Select an ACB or AWB file first.

notify.invalidDrop: Drop an ACB or AWB file here.

updates.title: Updates

status.upToDate: You are on the latest version.
status.waitingForJob: Waiting for the current job to finish…

notify.installing: Installing update… The app will restart.

updates.tauriOnly: Updates are only available in the installed Tauri app.

notify.directoryTauriOnly: Opening directories is only available in the Tauri app.
notify.assetCollectTauriOnly: Collecting game assets is only available in the Tauri app.
